957 CHMTHRPY_ORAL_DSCHRG_CD CHMTHRPY_ORAL_DSCHRG_CD O0110A3C Treatment: Chemo - Oral (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received oral chemotherapy in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
958 CHMTHRPY_OTHR_ADMSN_CD CHMTHRPY_OTHR_ADMSN_CD O0110A10A Treatment: Chemo - Other (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received an other form of chemotherapy days one through
